title: protium cubense
intro: Protium cubense, also known as Cuban tree binucao, is a species of tree in the family Burseraceae. The medicinal properties of Protium cubense include its use in treating skin conditions, such as acne and eczema, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Protium cubense include its potential to lower cholesterol levels and reduce the risk of heart disease, in addition to its ability to act as an antioxidant. Protium cubense is often prepared as an herbal tea, and its essential oil is used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
